sql.if: AND ( C.COMM_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR M.MBR_NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd}
ORDER BY C.COMM_NO DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd}

SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_AIS_NO AS commAisNo, C.COMM_PLC_NO AS commPlcNo, P.PLC_NAME AS plcName, C.COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL AS commMainImgUrl, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_CONTENT AS commContent, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_UP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commUpDate, C.COMM_USE_YN AS commUseYn FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON C.COMM_PLC_NO = P.PLC_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd} ORDER BY C.COMM_NO DESC

SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_AIS_NO AS commAisNo,
C.COMM_PLC_NO AS commPlcNo, P.PLC_NAME AS plcName, R.RGN_CD AS rgnCd, R.RGN_NAME AS rgnName, CC.CMM_CD AS plcCatCd, CC.CMM_CD_NAME AS plcCatName,
C.COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL AS commMainImgUrl, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_CONTENT AS commContent, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_UP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commUpDate, C.COMM_USE_YN AS commUseYn, GROUP_CONCAT(H.HTAG_TAG_NAME) AS hashtagText FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID
LEFT JOIN PLACE P ON C.COMM_PLC_NO = P.PLC_NO LEFT JOIN REGION R ON P.PLC_RGN_CD = R.RGN_CD LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE CC ON P.PLC_CAT_CD = CC.CMM_CD
LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON C.COMM_NO = CH.CHTG_COMM_NO LEFT JOIN HASHTAG H ON CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO = H.HTAG_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_NO = #{commNo} GROUP BY C.COMM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY ( COMM_MBR_ID, COMM_CAT_CD, COMM_AIS_NO, COMM_PLC_NO, COMM_TITLE, COMM_CONTENT, COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL ) VALUES ( #{commMbrId}, #{commCatCd}, #{commAisNo}, #{commPlcNo}, #{commTitle}, #{commContent}, #{commMainImgUrl} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_TITLE = #{commTitle}, COMM_CONTENT = #{commContent}, COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL = #{commMainImgUrl}, COMM_PLC_NO = #{commPlcNo}, COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_USE_YN = 'N', COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HASHTAG ( HTAG_TAG_NAME, HTAG_USE_CNT ) VALUES ( #{tagName}, 0 )

INSERT INTO FILE ( FILE_ORG_NM, FILE_SAVE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_EXT, FILE_SIZE, FILE_MIME_TYPE, FILE_TYPE, FILE_REG_DATE, FILE_USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{fileOrgNm}, #{fileSaveNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileExt}, #{fileSize}, #{fileMimeType}, #{fileType}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT F.FILE_PATH FROM COMMUNITY_FILE_MAP CFM JOIN FILE F ON CFM.CFM_FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO WHERE CFM.CFM_COMM_NO = #{commNo} ORDER BY CFM.CFM_SORT_ORDR ASC
SELECT RGN_CD AS rgnCd, RGN_NAME AS rgnName FROM REGION ORDER BY RGN_CD ASC
SELECT CMM_CD AS cmmCd, CMM_CD_NAME AS cmmCdName FROM CMM_CODE WHERE CMM_GROUP_CD = 'GRP002' AND CMM_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CMM_SORT_ORDR ASC
SELECT PLC_NO AS plcNo, PLC_NAME AS plcName FROM PLACE WHERE PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd} AND PLC_CAT_CD = #{catCd} AND PLC_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PLC_NAME ASC
